name: Oportun
description_short: Dallas, TX Oportun at El Rio Grande offers fast personal loans with flexible repayment terms for local borrowers.
description_long:
Oportun's Dallas, TX location sits inside the El Rio Grande area with convenient street access and parking. Open Monday through Friday from 11AM to 6:30PM, Saturday 10AM to 4PM, and closed Sundays, this Dallas branch serves personal loan applicants throughout the city and surrounding areas. Walk-in customers in Dallas can speak with a loan officer directly about their financing needs.

At this Dallas, TX Oportun branch, you can apply for personal loans designed with flexible terms and quick approval for Texas residents. Call 469-804-0590 to discuss your loan options, verify eligibility, or book an in-person appointment. The team here specializes in helping Dallas borrowers access same-day funding decisions.

If you're a Dallas resident needing fast personal loans, visit the El Rio Grande location during business hours and bring a government-issued ID, proof of income, and proof of residence. Oportun delivers same-day decisions for most applicants at this TX location, making emergency funding accessible when you need it most.
address: Inside El Rio Grande, 2515 W Jefferson Blvd, Dallas, TX 75211

company_info.headquarters: Inside El Rio Grande, 2515 W Jefferson Blvd, Dallas, TX 75211

pros: Accepts consular IDs — accessible to non-citizens and immigrants without a driver's license
Bilingual English/Spanish service model across all channels
Cash loan payments accepted at grocery stores, pharmacies, and corner stores via 5 payment networks
Both secured (car-title) and unsecured personal loan options available
Physical branch locations in all 50 states and D.C.
Accepts thin-file applicants through document-based underwriting (pay stubs, bank statements)
Mobile app with referral program — existing customers can earn $50 per referral
cons: Secured loans require car title as collateral — vehicle can be repossessed on default
APRs are substantially higher than traditional bank personal loans
Cash payments via PayNearMe carry a fee of up to $1.75 per transaction
In-person application requires gathering multiple physical documents before visiting a branch
No online-only application path evident from website — branch visit required
best_for: Borrowers with no credit history or thin credit files who need an installment loan
Spanish-speaking applicants seeking bilingual in-person loan service
Unbanked or underbanked consumers who pay and manage finances in cash
Immigrants or non-citizens who hold a consular ID rather than a U.S. driver's license
diagnosis: Oportun is best suited for borrowers who are locked out of traditional bank loans due to thin credit files, lack of a SSN-linked ID, or no bank account — particularly immigrant and Spanish-speaking communities. The main caveat is cost: APRs are far above bank rates, and the secured loan product carries repossession risk if payments are missed.
services: Secured personal loans (car title as collateral)
Cash loan payments via Dolex locations
Cash loan payments via Barri locations
Cash loan payments via CheckFreePay locations
Cash loan payments via MoneyGram (receive code 7991oportun)
Cash and debit payments via PayNearMe
Mobile app with customer account management
Referral bonus program ($50 per approved referral)
meta_description: Oportun at El Rio Grande, Dallas, TX. Personal loans with flexible terms and same-day funding available.
